|era=
|timeline=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] {{C|originally 30 months ABG}}<ref name="Rendili">{{FactFile2014|23|PLO 1-6|Plo Koon}} puts the Battle of Rendili prior to "[[Shadow of Malevolence]]," as part of the compression and rearranging of the pre-''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' timeline of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. As "Shadow of Malevolence" is dated to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] by {{FactFile2014|24|22 BBY 87-88|The ''Malevolence'' Campaign}}, the Battle of Rendili must also occur in that year.</ref>
|series=

'''''Star Wars: Republic: Dreadnaughts of Rendili''''' was the sixteenth story arc in ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]''.
